Basically my world is like
Built over a titan's body
And that titan was bon from  a star
Now this guy got bat up by god's because light is crazy thing to get sentient 
And that makes it inactive, the titan is called photos
And over time he is sealed under rubble of space
In that time he sheds shadow which are called shades
These things can bind to living beings, especially eople and give them powers
And both angels and demons want to use it and humans as a way to beat each other in fight
In my world I just call them gods above and gods below
They can give a person a blessing or sometimes more than one seeks one person, often times both an angel of virtue and a demon which leads to dual alignment (alignment is basically what role you have in a battle wether it's a DPS or a support and how like sins are attackers and self sustainers or enemy debuffer while virtues are buffers and often supports like team healer's and buffers)
So most humans instead of being consumed by it form parties filled with alignments that cover all needs
Most 
If you get consumed by your virtue or sin you become a monster too 
Now in order to go about their alignment role they have one of four attributes war, famine, plague and death which is usually the type of skill they have to execute their alignment
Like war and pride is a self sustainer who is an aggressive attacker
Famine and greed is an attack debuffer that uses the enemy loss equal to ally buff 
Tempremence and famine is a tank etc
